[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010110100 5
1 1010000000 2
2 0000000000 a
3 1000000000 1
4 1010110100 5
5 1010000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 1111011101 8
12 21 1010110111 7
23 32 1010110111 7

56 65 1111110100 7
67 76 1110110100 6
70 07 1111001101 7

35 53 1111100010 6
46 64 1010110100 5 match 0 4
57 75 1111000000 4
60 06 1111111101 9
71 17 1110010000 4

47 74 1110010000 4

61 16 1010110100 5 match 0 4
72 27 1110110111 8
